title: picris conyzoides
intro: Picris conyzoides, also known as hawkweed oxtongue, is a plant species in the dandelion-like Asteraceae family, characterized by its bitter and aromatic properties. Traditionally, Picris conyzoides has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and inflammation due to its bitter compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Picris conyzoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and even support liver health. Herbal preparations of Picris conyzoides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating.
